__source._realEquivalent: GET /api/method/erpnext.stock.get_item_details on the seller's ERPNext instance (e.g. erpnext.jupiterknitting.com/api/method/...) — returns the Bin record for the item across warehouses.
__source._demoNarrative: Available inventory (35,000 units) is below the buyer's request (50,000). Shortfall (15,000) requires the seller's standard 30-day manufacturing lead. canFulfill=false at the buyer's requested date but the seller can credibly commit to 2026-06-14 ship date. The L2 executive should use leadTimeDays + earliestShipDate when negotiating delivery clauses; the tactics engine treats partial-fulfilment as a delivery-date variable, not a price variable.
